name: wellness-zk-proofs
description: Zero-knowledge proof components for Wellness on the Block platform

scripts.build:circuits: npm run compile:circuits && npm run setup:keys
scripts.setup:keys: snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/identity.r1cs circuits/identity.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute circuits/identity.zkey circuits/identity.zkey && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuits/identity.zkey circuits/verification_key.json
scripts.setup:session-keys: snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/session.r1cs circuits/session.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute circuits/session.zkey circuits/session.zkey && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuits/session.zkey circuits/session_verification_key.json
scripts.setup:age-keys: snarkjs groth16 setup circuits/age.r1cs circuits/age.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute circuits/age.zkey circuits/age.zkey && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuits/age.zkey circuits/age_verification_key.json

author: Wellness on the Block Team
